assertions.assertion: Changes return types from IEnumerable<T> to IReadOnlyCollection<T>
assertions.rationale: This specific breaking change is Duende v8-specific and not general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Shows using .ToList() or .ToArray() to convert query results
assertions.rationale: Without knowing the return type change, the conversion pattern would not be suggested.

assertions.assertion: Adds CancellationToken parameter to the affected methods
assertions.rationale: CancellationToken additions are Duende v8-specific breaking changes.

assertions.assertion: Mentions this applies to multiple interfaces (IResourceStore, etc.)
assertions.rationale: The breadth of affected interfaces is Duende v8-specific internal knowledge.
